@graph.description: Pomegranate Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cognition; Stress Response; Cardiovascular Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Oxidative Stress Modulation; Vascular Function Support; Stress Response Modulation; Endothelial Function Support, not treatment claims.
